headline: US BOMBS 💥 IRAN 🚫 STRAIT 🛳️ CLOSED 😱 TRUMP 😡 PAYBACK TIME 🗡️
text: US Central Command 💥🔫 just DROPPED a FRESH BOMB WAVE 🧨🌊 on Iran after IRGC 😈🚀 blasted a Cyprus-flagged ship 🚢⚓️ in the STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🛳️🗺️! Iran clapped back by SLAMMING the waterway SHUT 🚫🛑 until further notice, saying the vessel went rogue and turned off its AIS like a sneaky little GREMLIN 🦹‍♂️📴. Centcom clapped back with ROUND 3 🎯 this week, straight-up YEETING 🔥 missiles at those who dared attack MV GFS Galaxy, leaving the poor engine room 🍆💥 in SHAMBLES and one crew member LOST AT SEA 🧜‍♂️😭. UKMTO says the crew ABANDONED SHIP and hopped in a LIFEBOAT like it was the TITANIC 2.0 🛟😩. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth 🍔🔨 straight-up tweeted 'Iran made a POOR CHOICE, now they PAY 💸🤑!' Iran warned any more US 'aggression' would get SLAPPED with 'SEVERITY' and new Gulf bases would get YEETED 🎯🏰. Meanwhile, new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei 🕋👳‍♂️ just debuted his reign by calling for VENGEANCE 🗡️😡 against the 'criminal killers' who iced his dad Ali Khamenei in that US-Israeli airstrike 💣 on Feb 28. Funeral crowds in Mashhad were holding TRUMP ASSASSINATION SIGNS 🪧🍊 and chanting for the Orange Man’s head, but Trump clapped back saying any plot would get Iran 'DECIMATED & DESTROYED' 💥🔥. Even with the ceasefire officially CANCELED ❌🤝, Trump says talks are STILL ON with mediators doing the diplomatic TWERK 💃🕊️. Oil & gas tankers are GHOSTING the US-backed route like it’s haunted 👻⛽, sending prices SKYROCKETING 📈💸. Iran claims rogue elements were to blame for tanker attacks, but the US wants Tehran to publicly PINKY-SWEAR 🤞 the Strait stays OPEN and they’ll stop playing target practice on cargo ships 🚢🎯. Ayatollah Mojtaba says vengeance is the 'will of the nation' and it will happen 'whether we are present or not' – basically the IRGC version of 'we’ll always have Paris' 🇫🇷💀. Bottom line: Hormuz drama is giving MAJOR geopolitical TEA ☕🌍 and everyone’s caught in the CROSSFIRE 💥🔥!
